title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.240 - Sale of property to innocent purchaser not affected by vacating judgment
text:
511.240.  Sale of property to innocent purchaser not affected by vacating judgment. — No sale or conveyance of property for the satisfaction of any judgment, regularly made, shall be affected or prejudiced by the setting aside any judgment on the appearance of a defendant, as herein provided, if the property shall be in the hands of innocent purchasers.
(RSMo 1939 § 1254) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1088; 1919 § 1539; 1909 § 2108
